scripts.text:
UPDATE A
SET A.UNI_Market = B.UNI_Market,
A.UNI_MarketGroup = B.UNI_MarketGroup,
A.UNI_CompanyReporting  = B.Division_MKTG
FROM [ZML].[DIM_ERP_BRANCH] A
LEFT JOIN 
(
SELECT DISTINCT ACU_ID,ACU_Market,UNI_Market,UNI_MarketGroup,Division_MKTG
FROM [ZML].[DIM_BRANCH_EXTN]
) B 
ON A.BranchCode = B.ACU_ID
WHERE B.UNI_Market IS NOT NULL AND B.UNI_Market!='';


UPDATE [ZML].[DIM_ERP_BRANCH]
SET UNI_CompanyReporting = 'H.Rite Window'
WHERE UNI_CompanyReporting = 'E.Home Smart';


UPDATE [ZML].[DIM_ERP_BRANCH]
SET UNI_CompanyReporting = 'A.FHIA'
WHERE TRIM(UNI_CompanyReporting) = 'F.Max Home';

UPDATE [ZML].[DIM_ERP_BRANCH]
SET UNI_CompanyReporting = 'A.Renuity East'
WHERE TRIM(UNI_CompanyReporting) = 'A.FHIA';
